## Summary

## Ideation checklist (WSG 2.8)

Before investing effort in implementation, confirm:

- [ ] This change is genuinely needed (not just possible).
- [ ] The simplest approach that meets the requirement was considered first.
- [ ] Planet and community impact has been considered, not only immediate user need.
- [ ] No existing component or solution already covers this need.

## Sustainability impact

- [ ] Improves sustainability (reduces page weight, compute, or emissions)
- [ ] Neutral (no expected sustainability impact)
- [ ] Regresses sustainability — justification required below

**Page weight / request impact:**

<!-- e.g. "No change", "+2 kB gzip", "removes 1 third-party script" -->

**Third-party impact:**

<!-- New scripts, fonts, or services? Justify each one. -->

**AI usage disclosure:**

<!-- Was AI used to generate or assist this change? Note the tool and scope, or write "None". -->
